summary: Iteration 54: Neodent Helix GM Drilling Protocol Testing - 21/21 tests PASSED (100%). All Helix GM Acqua/Neoporous protocols verified with updated per-diameter sequences, Plus drill (coronal only) for D1/D2, and no Plus drill for D3/D4.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Helix GM Acqua 3.5mm D1): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->Plus 3.5+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 2 (Helix GM Acqua 3.5mm D4): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->Implant (no Plus, stop before final)
Feature 3 (Helix GM Acqua 3.75mm D2): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->Plus 3.75+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 4 (Helix GM Acqua 3.75mm D3): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->Implant
Feature 5 (Helix GM Acqua 4.0mm D2): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->Plus 4.0+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 6 (Helix GM Acqua 4.0mm D3): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->Implant
Feature 7 (Helix GM Acqua 4.3mm D2): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->4.3->Plus 4.3+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 8 (Helix GM Acqua 4.3mm D3): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->Implant
Feature 9 (Helix GM Acqua 5.0mm D1): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->4.3->5.0->Plus 5.0+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 10 (Helix GM Acqua 5.0mm D4): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->4.3->Implant
Feature 11 (Helix GM Acqua 6.0mm D2): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->4.3->5.0->6.0->Plus 6.0+(Coronal ONLY)->Implant
Feature 12 (Helix GM Acqua 6.0mm D4): PASS - sequence 2.0->2.8->3.5->3.75->4.0->4.3->5.0->Implant
Feature 13 (Helix GM Neoporous): PASS - produces same protocol as Acqua (shared definition)
Feature 14 (Plus Drill depth): PASS - depth is 'Coronal ONLY' (not implant length)
Feature 15 (Plus Drill note): PASS - mentions 'Crestal cortical expansion only'
Feature 16 (Non-Plus drill depths): PASS - all equal implant length
Feature 17 (PDF Export): PASS - returns 200 with valid PDF
Feature 18 (Regression Drive GM Acqua): PASS - 4.3mm D2 still works
Feature 19 (Regression Titamax GM Acqua): PASS - 3.75mm D2 still works
Feature 20 (Regression Bredent Blue Sky): PASS - still works
Feature 21 (Available Protocols): PASS - Helix GM Acqua and Neoporous listed
seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Neodent Helix GM drilling protocols fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: DRILLING_PROTOCOLS entries at lines 4795-4808 in server.py, _generate_neodent_protocol function at line 4848. Protocol rules: (1) 2.0mm initial drill always added globally, (2) helix_protocols dict contains per-diameter D1_D2/D3_D4 arrays starting from 2.8mm, (3) D1/D2 = drill up to implant diameter + Plus drill (coronal only), (4) D3/D4 = stop one drill before final diameter (no Plus drill), (5) Plus drill depth = 'Coronal ONLY' with note 'Crestal cortical expansion only', (6) All non-Plus drill depths = implant length. DB system names: 'Helix GM Acqua', 'Helix GM Neoporous'. Brand is 'Neodent'. Both systems share the same DRILLING_PROTOCOLS entry. Drive GM and Titamax GM protocols were NOT changed and still work via the same _generate_neodent_protocol function.

tested_endpoints.GET /api/drilling-protocols/available: 200 - Returns Helix GM Acqua and Neoporous
tested_endpoints.POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate: 200 - Generates correct protocol for all diameters, lengths, and bone densities

key_rules.d1_d2_rule: Drill up to implant diameter + Plus drill (coronal only)
key_rules.d3_d4_rule: Stop one drill before final diameter, no Plus drill
key_rules.plus_drill_note: Crestal cortical expansion only - NOT full osteotomy depth
